app.title: TouchFish Formatter
app.subtitle: Luogu Article Format Checker
editor.placeholder: Paste your Luogu article Markdown here...
config.title: Formatting Rules
config.fwPunctuationDesc: Convert half-width punctuation to full-width after CJK characters
config.ellipsisToFwDesc: Convert ... to full-width ellipsis ……, independent of full-width punctuation toggle
config.normalizeMathSpacesDesc: Automatically trim leading/trailing spaces in math blocks ($...$)
config.removeDuplicateBlankLinesDesc: Collapse three or more consecutive blank lines into a single blank line
ruleHint.sym/star-to-times: Only replaces * in math formulas; code blocks are unaffected
ruleHint.sym/less-equal: Replaces comparison operator with LaTeX less-than-or-equal symbol
ruleHint.sym/greater-equal: Replaces comparison operator with LaTeX greater-than-or-equal symbol
ruleHint.sym/not-equal: Replaces comparison operator with LaTeX not-equal symbol
ruleHint.sym/double-equal-to-single: Converts equality check == to math equals; use with caution in code descriptions
ruleHint.sym/arrow-right-to: Supports multi-dash arrows like -->, replaces with LaTeX right arrow
ruleHint.sym/arrow-left-gets: Supports multi-dash arrows like <--, replaces with LaTeX left arrow
ruleHint.sym/double-arrow-implies: Supports multi-equals like ==>, replaces with LaTeX double-line right arrow
ruleHint.sym/mod: Replaces % with \bmod in math; skips already-escaped tokens
ruleHint.sym/bitwise-xor: Replaces lowercase xor with \oplus; triggers when not adjacent to letters
ruleHint.sym/infinity: Replaces INF or inf with \infty; triggers when not adjacent to letters
ruleHint.sym/floor-div: Replaces // with \div (integer division); used in math blocks only
ruleHint.fn/gcd: Triggers only when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright function name
ruleHint.fn/min: Triggers only when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright function name
ruleHint.fn/max: Triggers only when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright function name
ruleHint.fn/log: Triggers only when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright function name
ruleHint.fn/lca: Converts to \operatorname{LCA}; skips tokens already wrapped in \operatorname
ruleHint.fn/lcm: Converts to \operatorname{lcm}; skips tokens already wrapped in \operatorname
ruleHint.fn/mex: Converts to \operatorname{MEX}; skips tokens already wrapped in \operatorname
ruleHint.fn/sin: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright trig function name
ruleHint.fn/cos: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright trig function name
ruleHint.fn/tan: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright trig function name
ruleHint.fn/ln: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright log function name
ruleHint.fn/exp: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright exp function name
ruleHint.fn/sqrt: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; converts to \sqrt command
ruleHint.fn/mod: Replaces standalone mod with \bmod; triggers when not adjacent to letters
ruleHint.fn/xor: Converts uppercase XOR to \operatorname{XOR}; skips already-wrapped tokens
ruleHint.fn/dis: Replaces dis or dist with \operatorname{dis}; common in graph theory
ruleHint.fn/deg: Triggers when not adjacent to letters; adds LaTeX upright degree function name
ruleHint.fn/popcount: Converts popcount to \operatorname{popcount} (bit count, common in CP)
ruleHint.syn/array-to-subscript: Converts array access like a[i][j] to subscript a_{i,j}; code blocks are automatically skipped
ruleHint.syn/superscript-pow: Removes spaces around ^ so that a ^ b becomes a^b
ruleHint.syn/abs-to-bracket: Converts abs(x) to \lvert x \rvert; supports arbitrary expressions
ruleHint.syn/ceil-floor: Converts ceil(x) to \lceil x \rceil and floor(x) to \lfloor x \rfloor
config.clang.disabledHint: Code formatting is disabled. Enable it to automatically run clang-format on C/C++ code blocks.
config.clang.languagesHint: Only format code blocks matching these identifiers, comma-separated. Supports any language clang-format knows.
config.clang.note: Code formatting uses clang-format WASM (v22) on code blocks matching the language list above.
about.title: About TouchFish Formatter
about.description: A Markdown formatter for fixing common formatting issues and assisting in writing, making articles more polished and readable.
about.author: Author
